content: SELL flow: include shipping in PayPal order gross (payments.py listing_buy_create)
DONATE flow: PayPal order when shipping_fee > 0 + capture endpoint + JWT email after capture
Frontend: CreateListing form input for shipping fee + community pickup nudge
Frontend: ListingDetail shows shipping fee + community pickup nudge
Frontend: Donate claim — handle PayPal redirect when shipping_fee > 0
Transactions page: multi-select status chips + filtering
Transactions page: Confirm-receipt CTA on accepted swap/donate rows
